app.title: IRS Helper
app.subtitle: Enrich your IRS declaration (Anexo J & Anexo G) with broker reports easily.

result.title: Enrichment Results
result.subtitle: {{count}} total rows were added across {{activeTables}} table(s).

error.no_rows: No relevant rows found in the provided PDF(s).
error.fallback: Something went wrong. Please refresh the page.

error.xtb_wrong_file_gains: "{{fileName}}" appears to be a Dividends PDF. Please place it in the XTB Dividends slot instead.
error.xtb_wrong_file_dividends: "{{fileName}}" appears to be a Capital Gains PDF. Please place it in the XTB Capital Gains slot instead.
error.xtb_no_gains_rows: No capital gains data found in "{{fileName}}". Please verify this is an XTB Capital Gains report.
error.xtb_no_dividends_rows: No dividend data found in "{{fileName}}". Please verify this is an XTB Dividends report.
error.tr_wrong_file: "{{fileName}}" does not appear to be a Trade Republic Tax Report. Please upload the correct file.
error.tr_no_rows: No dividend/interest data found in "{{fileName}}". Please verify this is a Trade Republic Tax Report.
error.file_too_large: "{{fileName}}" is too large to process safely. Please provide a smaller PDF.
error.too_many_pages: "{{fileName}}" has too many pages to process safely.

uploader.xml_description: Upload the XML file exported from the Tax Authority portal.
uploader.brokers_description: Upload PDF reports from your brokers to extract financial data.
uploader.drag_drop: Drag & drop or click to browse
uploader.xtb_warning_1: Optional 'RENDIMENTOS OBTIDOS EM TERRITÓRIO PORTUGUÊS' (Annex E 4 B) are ignored.
uploader.xtb_warning_2: Shares/Bonds from PT-resident entities (Annex G 9) are ignored.
uploader.xtb_warning_3: Foreign Sourced CFDs (Annex J 9.2 B) are ignored.
uploader.xtb_warning_4: PT Sourced Fractional Shares (Annex G 8) are ignored.
uploader.tr_warning_1: RENDIMENTOS DE INCREMENTOS PATRIMONIAIS (Annex J 9.2 A) are ignored.
uploader.tr_warning_2: RENDIMENTOS DE INCREMENTOS PATRIMONIAIS (Annex J 9.2 B) are ignored.
